%% ─── Table 1: Summary comparison ────────────────────────────────────────────
\begin{table}[!htb]
\centering
\caption{Quantitative Comparison: Manual vs.\ AI-Agent STRIDE Analysis}
\label{tab:stride-comparison}
\begin{tabular}{@{}lrr@{}}
\toprule
\textbf{Metric} & \textbf{Manual} & \textbf{AI Agent} \\
\midrule
Threats detected --- insecure system & 20    & 10    \\
Threats detected --- secure system   & 8     & 6     \\
Total coverage (\%)                  & 100.0 & 50.0  \\
Recall (\%)                          & 100.0 & 40.0  \\
Precision (\%)                       & --    & 80.0  \\
False positive rate (\%)             & --    & 20.0  \\
F1 Score (\%)                        & --    & 53.0  \\
Analysis time (s)                    & 5400  & 13.47 \\
Speedup ratio                        & 1\texttimes{} & 401\texttimes{} \\
Differentiation ratio                & 2.50  & 1.67  \\
STRIDE categories covered            & 6/6   & 5/6   \\
High-severity threats --- insecure   & --    & 6     \\
High-severity threats --- secure     & --    & 0     \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\\[3pt]
\footnotesize{Coverage = (agent threats / manual threats) $\times$ 100.
Differentiation = threats(insecure) / threats(secure).
Speedup = $t_{\text{manual}} / t_{\text{agent}}$.
Sources: \texttt{manual-analysis-insecure.json},
\texttt{threats-output.json}, \texttt{secure-threats.json}.
Generated 2026-04-25.}
\end{table}

\label{tab:per-category}
\begin{tabular}{@{}lrrrrrrc@{}}
\toprule
\textbf{Category} & \textbf{TP} & \textbf{FP} & \textbf{FN} &
\textbf{Recall} & \textbf{Precision} & \textbf{Covered} \\
\midrule
Spoofing             & 3 & 0 & 1 & 75.0\% & 100.0\% & \checkmark \\
Tampering            & 2 & 0 & 2 & 50.0\% & 100.0\% & \checkmark \\

InformationDisclosure& 2 & 1 & 1 & 67.0\% &  67.0\% & \checkmark \\

\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\\[3pt]
\footnotesize{TP = True Positive; FP = False Positive; FN = False Negative.
Covered = at least one TP detected in the category.
Repudiation and DenialOfService show Recall = 0\%: inherent limitation
of static analysis for runtime behavioral properties.
Sources: \texttt{manual-analysis-insecure.json},
\texttt{threats-output.json}.
Generated 2026-04-25.}
\end{table}
